title: MCGambling
description: A Minecraft gambling plugin with lots of options!
body:
This plugin adds exciting and risky gambling mini-games to your Minecraft server using interactive GUIs. Designed for fun, it gives players new ways to win—or lose—diamonds in a casino-style experience.

### GAMES
- Blackjack
- Coin Tower
- Stock Market
- Dice
- High or Low
- Line Gamble
- Poker
- Russian Roulette
- Slot Machine
- Treasure Hunt
- Wheel of Fortune

### HOW IT WORKS
This plugin updates guis to make it look like items are moving so that you get to watch it happen live.

<details>
<summary>WARNINGS</summary>

WARNING THIS IS ADDICTING, IF YOU HAVE A GAMBLING ADDICTION DOWNLOAD AT YOUR OWN RISK

</details>

### REQUIREMENTS
[Simple Gui Api](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-gui-api) and a spigot server.

please enjoy this gambling plugin :)
